features: Effortless Crease Removal: Instantly smooths out creases from clothing, bedding, and fabrics straight after washing and drying!
Fresh Exotic Bloom & Moonlight Lily Scent: Infused with Lenor‚Äôs iconic fragrance to refresh fabrics with a long-lasting, uplifting scent.
Reduces Static & Eliminates Odours: Helps reduce static while neutralising unwanted smells for cleaner, fresher feeling fabrics.
Fabric Freshener + Crease Control: A unique formula that relaxes fibres, releases wrinkles, and reduces ironing time and effort.
Easy & Safe to Use: Simply spray, smooth, and leave to dry.
description: Product Description Say goodbye to time-consuming ironing with Lenor Crease Releaser Exotic Bloom & Moonlight Lily, your ‚ÄúIron in a Bottle.‚Äù Specially formulated to relax fabric fibres, this powerful spray makes creases disappear quickly and effortlessly, leaving clothes and bedding smoother and fresher. Perfect for quick touch-ups, travel, freshening wardrobes, or reducing wrinkles after washing and drying. Infused with Lenor‚Äôs beloved Exotic Bloom & Moonlight Lily fragrance, it not only removes creases but also freshens fabrics, reduces static, and eliminates lingering odours giving your laundry a clean, revitalised feel. Perfect for busy households, travellers, or anyone who loves crisp, fresh laundry with minimal effort. Ingredients Contains among other ingredients: Less than 5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Also contains: Perfume and Preservative (Laurylamine Dipropylenediamine, 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1, 3-Diol) Ingredients: (www.starlaundryaids.co.uk) Directions Place a towel under item to protect surfaces from excess product. From a distance of about 15cm, spray fabric evenly in a sweeping motion and smooth and pull fabric as required to remove creases. Allow to fully dry before wearing or use.
